title: Rust for Systems Programming: Memory Safety Without GC
author: Winter Kim
Systems Programmer
description: Build high-performance systems with Rust's ownership model—but learning curve is steep
content:
Rust provides memory safety guarantees without garbage collection through its ownership system.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Rewrite (2033)](/docs/articles/rewrite-2033)
